---
name: Workflow question
about: "How do I make this work with my data or setup?"
labels: question
---

This template is for "how do I use this with my data" questions. It keeps the bug tracker clean and helps us understand real-world usage. There are no wrong answers.

## Camera setup

- **Camera brand(s) and model(s):** (e.g. Bushnell Core, Reconyx HyperFire 2, Browning Strike Force)
- **Approximate number of images per season:**
- **Folder structure on disk:** (e.g. flat folder / per-camera subfolders / date-based hierarchy / SD card naming convention)

## What you're trying to accomplish

(Describe your workflow in a sentence or two — e.g. "I want to review SpeciesNet output for a 3-year savanna dataset and export confirmed detections to a Wildlife Insights CSV.")

## Where you're stuck

## Additional context

(Any other relevant details — unusual file naming, mixed camera brands, specific SpeciesNet version, geographic region, etc.)
